description: Footer Standardization (9 pages) + Bug Fixes (Registration Redirect, Page Hierarchy, Menu Order, Script Tags, Legal Pages)

tasks.title: Fix Registration Redirect (Welcome → About Us)
tasks.notes: After renaming Welcome to About Us, registration form was redirecting to /welcome (404). Set WPUM wp_login_signup_redirect to page 6 (About Us). Applied to local and production March 11, 2026.

tasks.title: Log In Page (No Migration Needed)
tasks.notes: Form-only page using WP User Manager shortcode. Already styled correctly, no design token migration needed.

tasks.title: Password Reset Page (No Migration Needed)
tasks.notes: Form-only page using WP User Manager shortcode. Already styled correctly, no design token migration needed.

tasks.title: Register Page (No Migration Needed)
tasks.notes: Form-only page using WP User Manager shortcode. Already styled correctly, no design token migration needed.

tasks.title: Account Page (No Migration Needed)
tasks.notes: Form-only page using WP User Manager shortcode. Already styled correctly, no design token migration needed.

tasks.title: Profile Page (No Migration Needed)
tasks.notes: Form-only page using WP User Manager shortcode. Already styled correctly, no design token migration needed.

tasks.title: Privacy Policy Page Design Token Migration
tasks.notes: Legal page - Updated with complete GDPR-compliant content, design tokens applied, 200 lines. Updated March 11, 2026.

tasks.title: Terms & Conditions Page Design Token Migration
tasks.notes: Legal page - Updated with complete legal terms, design tokens applied, non-circumvention clause, 123 lines. Updated March 11, 2026.

tasks.title: Footer Standardization (9 Pages)
tasks.notes: Standardized footer across all role landing pages: About Us, Candidates, Employers, Scouts, Managers, Operators, Manager Admin, Manager Actions, Operator Actions. Applied spacing--50, #4A5568 color, 18px icons with 8px margins (4px for EU flag), removed WordPress comments.

tasks.title: Fix Page Hierarchy (Delete Duplicates)
tasks.notes: Deleted duplicate pages created without proper parent relationships: ID 116 (Operator Actions duplicate), ID 106 (Admin Operations duplicate), ID 43 (Manager Actions duplicate). Correct child pages verified: Manager Admin (44) under Managers (19), Manager Actions (105) under Managers (19), Operator Actions (84) under Operators (20).

tasks.title: Fix Manager Actions Page Slug
tasks.notes: Changed Manager Actions slug from 'manager-actions' to 'actions' to match Operator Actions and maintain consistency. URL changed from /managers/manager-actions/ to /managers/actions/.

tasks.title: Fix Navigation Menu Order
tasks.notes: Fixed menu order to match local: Profile (position 3), Help (position 4), Login (position 5). Previously Help appeared after Login, causing inconsistency with local environment.

tasks.title: Fix Script Tags on Action Pages
tasks.notes: WordPress was stripping <script> tags during deployment. Created special deployment scripts that disable wp_filter_post_kses temporarily to preserve script tags on Manager Actions (ID 105) and Operator Actions (ID 84). JavaScript for tab switching now executes properly instead of displaying as text.

testingNotes: ✅ Verify all 9 pages have standardized footers with 4 trust badges (completed March 12)
✅ Test Manager Actions and Operator Actions tab switching works (JavaScript executes, not visible as text)
✅ Verify menu order: About Us, Register, Profile, Help, Login, Logout
✅ Verify page hierarchy: Manager Admin and Manager Actions under Managers, Operator Actions under Operators
Verify Privacy Policy page displays correctly with design tokens
Verify Terms & Conditions page displays correctly with design tokens
Check legal pages accessible from footer links
Verify form pages (Log In, Password Reset, Register, Account, Profile) still work correctly
deploymentNotes: ✅ Registration redirect fix applied to production (March 11, 13:30)
✅ Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions updated in local (March 11, 23:10)
✅ Footer standardization deployed to all 9 pages (March 12, 22:30)
✅ Script tags preserved on Manager Actions and Operator Actions (March 12, 22:56)
All caches flushed after each deployment
Legal pages required for GDPR compliance - critical deployment
Verify footer links to legal pages after deployment
